theme.description: A warm, Indian-business friendly yet sharp, editorial fintech SaaS dashboard. Combines the gravitas of traditional wealth management (serif typography) with the efficiency of modern SaaS (dense data, flat borders).

typography.heading_strategy: Editorial Serifs for large numbers (Revenue at risk) and page titles to build trust and convey 'premium banking' feel.
typography.body_strategy: Clean, crisp sans-serif for dense data tables, charts, and secondary text.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Dense but breathable. High reliance on 1px borders for structure rather than heavy shadows.
spacing_and_layout.card_style: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-stone-200), minimal shadow (shadow-sm), slight rounding (rounded-md).
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align data and typography. Numbers should use tabular nums.

components.dashboard_grid: CSS Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4). Top row for hero metrics (Revenue at Risk). Bottom rows for tables (Proposals, Invoices).
components.status_pills: Use the status colors defined above. Small text (text-xs), rounded-full, 1px border. MUST have contrasting text.
components.buttons: Primary actions use the accent Saffron/Ochre. font-sans, sharp corners (rounded-md), solid background. Hover: slight darkening.
components.tables: Shadcn UI table heavily customized. NO vertical borders, subtle 1px horizontal borders (border-stone-100). Padding p-3 per cell. text-sm.
components.draft_modal: Shadcn UI Dialog. Side-by-side view for WhatsApp vs Email. Use 'warm/playful' microcopy.
components.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='proposal-status-pill', data-testid='revenue-hero-number').

micro_interactions.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-[1px]) and shadow-md increase on rows or cards.
micro_interactions.numbers: Count-up animation for the Revenue at Risk hero number.
micro_interactions.status_change: Smooth color fade when status changes from Active to Cold.

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for icons. Use icons sparingly, focus on typography.
Format ALL currency using Indian numbering system (e.g., ₹ 1,50,000) using Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR', maximumFractionDigits: 0 }).
The Hero 'Revenue at Risk' MUST use the Cormorant Garamond font and be massive.
Ensure 'Today's Action List' supports a simple 'mark done' interaction with strike-through styling.
Implement light theme as default. Use #FAF9F6 as the main background.
For the AI Draft Follow-up, include a toggle/tabs for 'WhatsApp' vs 'Email' drafts.
Remember to include data-testid on every interactive element.
